name: Frog Bard
short_description: Frog Bard is a short, poetic experience about finding inspiration in the world around you. Explore a simple forest and perform reflective ballads as you travel from inn to inn.
detailed_description:
Frog Bard is a short, poetic experience about finding inspiration in the world around you. Explore a simple forest and perform reflective ballads as you travel from inn to inn.

Drive through a procedurally generated forest to find sparks of inspiration. Select thoughtful themes for your songs to perform at an inn. Break even and continue your journey.

Please note that Frog Bard is a short (5-10 minutes) but re-playable experience.

This game features an original song played on a guitar that was now modified so we'll never hear that guitar play this song again!!!
